LanguageData.ShootingAccuracy.degreeDatas.1.label: reckless combatant
LanguageData.ShootingAccuracy.degreeDatas.1.descripti:
Reckless! Reckless! Reckless! [PAWN_nameDef] charges into every fight without restraint. [PAWN_pronoun] attacks faster in both ranged and melee, but hits less precisely in both.
created/edited by easyrim
